summary: Excellent audience recording of a great show, praised for its awesome sound and solid performance.
review: Both reviewers describe this tape as an outstanding audience (Aud) source with clear, vibrant sound. The concert itself is called a "sick" and "pretty great" performance, though no specific songs are highlighted. Overall the recording is highly listenable and captures the energy of the night.

ai_rating.rationale: Two very positive reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) praise both the performance and the audio quality, suggesting a high‑quality show with an excellent audience recording; limited sample size reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as "awesome sounding" and "great Aud" with no reported flaws; clear, vibrant capture of the live mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance described as "pretty great" and "sick show", indicating strong overall energy though reviewers did not single out specific moments.
